title: The Adventures of Tyrano Boy
original_title: あなたをずっとあいしてる
overview: Toron, a young tyrannosaurus boy, is carried off downstream and loses his memory. While making his way back home, he discovers new friends and finds out that working together is the only way forward in life.

trailers.title: ANATA WO ZUTTO AISHITERU ( Opening on 20 Aug at selected GV Cinemas)
